description: Fronting and labialization of the uvular nasal [ɴ] to the bilabial nasal [m]. This is a form of assimilation where the nasal articulatorily anticipates a following labial sound.

languageExamples.description: The moraic nasal /ɴ/ is realized as [m] before bilabial consonants like [p], [b], and [m]. For instance, in the word 'shinbun' (newspaper) /ɕiɴbuɴ/, the first /ɴ/ is pronounced [m], resulting in [ɕimbɯɴ].

sources: Ladefoged, P. (2001). A Course in Phonetics.
